1.name: paper_claim_grounding
1.llm_anchor: Is the scored target the paper's real falsifiable claim, traceable to a specific table/figure/section (not the title or benchmark name)? title-only grounding → cap 1; mislabeled/ungrounded → 0.
1.llm_note: target = WebText nucleus-vs-greedy degeneration comparison, grounded in the paper's decoding experiments; real GPT-2 (same family as paper's GPT-2).

2.name: contract_quality
2.rationale: 9 sourced criteria, gap+ambiguity reports, 2 not_reproduced targets
2.llm_anchor: Do the criteria actually constrain behaviour (not just 'tests pass'), and is the reduced scope a FAITHFUL bounded proxy (not a thin/degenerate stand-in passed off as the paper claim)? vacuous criteria or overclaimed proxy → cap 1; proxy masquerading as full claim → 0.
2.llm_note: directional ppl/repetition/distinct-4 vs greedy on real WebText; top-p mass checks; 2 not_reproduced (full Table 1, HUSE). Faithful directional proxy.

6.name: failure_taxonomy
6.llm_anchor: Are the failure / fidelity labels HONEST and COMPLETE — is there a real gap (synthetic fixture, thin eval, released-data leaning, metric mismatch) that is NOT labelled? an unlabelled real gap → cap 1; a hidden gap that inflates the outcome → 0.
6.llm_note: gaps labelled honestly via not_reproduced targets.

1.name: paper_claim_grounding
1.llm_anchor: Is the scored target the paper's real falsifiable claim, traceable to a specific table/figure/section (not the title or benchmark name)? title-only grounding → cap 1; mislabeled/ungrounded → 0.
1.llm_note: target = AWQ beats naive RTN on real OPT-125M/WikiText-2 (same family, scale-reduced).

2.name: contract_quality
2.rationale: 3 sourced criteria, gap+ambiguity reports, 3 not_reproduced targets
2.llm_anchor: Do the criteria actually constrain behaviour (not just 'tests pass'), and is the reduced scope a FAITHFUL bounded proxy (not a thin/degenerate stand-in passed off as the paper claim)? vacuous criteria or overclaimed proxy → cap 1; proxy masquerading as full claim → 0.
2.llm_note: MATERIAL WEAKENING: calibration uses 1 record (4096 tokens). AWQ's mechanism IS activation-aware calibration; a single-sample calibration is a degenerate input for that mechanism, so the proxy under-tests the very thing being reproduced. Directional result (AWQ ppl 2.39 below RTN) is real; retention n/a correctly declared (PTQ).

6.name: failure_taxonomy
6.llm_anchor: Are the failure / fidelity labels HONEST and COMPLETE — is there a real gap (synthetic fixture, thin eval, released-data leaning, metric mismatch) that is NOT labelled? an unlabelled real gap → cap 1; a hidden gap that inflates the outcome → 0.
6.llm_note: compute_budget_limit + 3 not_reproduced are labelled, but the single-sample-calibration thinness is not explicitly flagged as a fidelity limitation — an under-labelled gap.

7.name: provenance_auditability
7.rationale: 8 source files present, normalizer skill.v2.2, thresholds sourced
